economic_notes: Malahat Nation has extensive business enterprises including Malahat Aquaculture Ltd., Malahat Construction Ltd., MNQM Contracting Ltd., Yos Economic Development Ltd., Malahat Forestry (2012) Ltd., Malahat Investment Corporation, Malahat Nation Land Corporation, Malahat Tenure Holding Ltd., Malahat Hazelwood Construction Ltd., Malahat Business Park GP Ltd., Malahat Nelson GP Ltd., Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd., and various limited partnerships. Malahat Business Park under construction. Related party transactions include $375,000 contribution and $475,377 expense reimbursement from YOS Economic Development LP for Business Park construction.
notes: Audit is qualified because financial information for related government business enterprises and partnerships was not available and not accounted for in consolidated statements - consistent with prior year qualification. Long-term debt includes $40,632,940 in FNFA promissory notes plus $2,898,810 in All Nations Trust/Peace Hill Trust mortgage loans plus $48,334 capital lease obligations totalling approximately $43,580,084. GBE financial information unavailable means investments/liabilities in GBEs are not updated from prior year values. Subsequent event: band-owned house burned down June 10, 2021 post year-end. COVID-19 noted as potential impact. ISC Recovery line was $0 actual (budget was -$20,000). OSR calculated as total revenue $10,878,660 minus government transfers (ISC $2,568,668 + CMHC $110,299 + DFO $1,405,551 + FNHA $1,360,508 + NRCan $24,384 + HRSDC $17,250 + Province of BC $1,364,874 + Gaming $338,544 + FN Organizations $308127) = approximately $3,381,455; gaming revenue classification uncertain.
